consistency.class_level_match: Consistent; Pact Boons are a core feature gained by Warlocks at 3rd level.

quality.completeness: Incomplete. The 'description' field only introduces the concept; it fails to list the actual Pact Boons (e.g., Pact of the Blade, Tome, Chain). This is common for introductory feature JSONs that might link elsewhere, but mechanically it's a placeholder.

mechanics.impact: Major class defining feature, granting a permanent choice that shapes future play.
mechanics.system_notes: This entry typically serves as a parent or selector for multiple sub-features, as the choice itself is the mechanical trigger.

recommendations: Ensure the dependent Pact Boon features are correctly linked or fully defined elsewhere, as this entry is currently just an introduction.
